Localization.Description: Attempt to retrieve a list of policies

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} retrieved a list of active Kerberos TGT policies on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} searched for group password policy "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} retrieved a list of group password policies on host {event_src.host}
